name: commitcraft
description: Generate Git commit messages using AI (Claude or Ollama)

markdownEnumDescriptions: Anthropic Claude API. Requires an API key — run **CommitCraft: Set API Key** from the Command Palette to store it securely.
Local Ollama instance. Free, no API key needed. Ollama must be running on this machine (or at the configured host URL).
commitcraft.provider.markdownDescription: AI provider for commit message generation. Switch between **Claude** (cloud) and **Ollama** (local).

commitcraft.ollamaHost.description: Ollama server URL. The default works for a standard local installation.

commitcraft.ollamaModel.markdownDescription: The Ollama model to use. Click the model indicator in the status bar (bottom-right) or run **CommitCraft: Select Model** from the Command Palette to pick from your installed models. The chosen model is saved here automatically.
